query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN richBioJson IS NOT NULL AND richBioJson != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_rich_bio FROM author_profiles; SELECT authorName FROM author_profiles WHERE richBioJson IS NULL OR richBioJson = '' ORDER BY authorName LIMIT 10;
